Grace Adeyemi
Supply Chain Analyst, New York, NY
grace.adeyemi@example.com | 555-201-3016 | linkedin.com/in/grace-adeyemi-scm

SUMMARY
Supply chain analyst with 5 years optimizing demand planning, inventory, and
logistics for a national retailer. Strong in forecasting, procurement, and ERP
analytics to cut cost and improve service levels.

EXPERIENCE
Supply Chain Analyst — National Goods Co (2021–present)
- Own demand planning and forecasting for 1,200 SKUs, reducing stockouts 28%
  while cutting excess inventory through improved replenishment models.
- Analyze logistics and distribution performance in SAP, optimizing freight,
  warehouse throughput, and fulfillment across three distribution centers.
- Partner with procurement and sourcing to negotiate vendor lead times and manage
  purchase orders.

Logistics Coordinator — Eastport Distribution (2019–2021)
- Coordinated inbound and outbound shipments, carrier scheduling, and warehouse
  inventory; tracked KPIs on on-time delivery and fill rate.

SKILLS
Supply chain, logistics, demand planning, forecasting, inventory, procurement,
sourcing, SAP, ERP, distribution, warehouse, fulfillment, freight, vendor
management, replenishment, transportation

EDUCATION
B.S. Supply Chain Management, Rutgers University, 2019
